info.name: Scylla Live Monitoring API - Aligned with Docs
info.description: Collection lengkap untuk Live Monitoring endpoints (Point 5, 6, 7 dari Monitoring Activity - BE.md). Semua endpoint sudah di-align dengan dokumentasi.

request.description: Login untuk mendapatkan JWT token. Token akan digunakan untuk semua endpoint Live Monitoring.

query.description: Approval status filter (required). Sesuai docs FE kirim 'Approved'
Employee IDs filter (optional). Array of int.

request.description:
**Point 5 dari Docs - Location Monitoring (Principal)**

URL: `{{url}}scylla-pjp/v1/live-monitoring-principal`

**Changes yang sudah diimplementasikan:**
1. ✅ Query menggunakan LEFT JOIN untuk m_distributor (data tetap muncul walau distributor null)
2. ✅ Query join outlet_visit_list menggunakan `pjp.pjp_code = ovl.pjp_code` (bukan outlet_code)
3. ✅ Response field `pjp_code` (bukan `pjp_id`)
4. ✅ Response field `skip_reason` ditambahkan
5. ✅ Filter region_id, area_id, distributor_id menjadi optional

**Expected Response Structure:**
```json
{
  "message": "Success",
  "data": [
    {
      "emp_id": 9999,
      "emp_code": "SLS9999",
      "emp_name": "Salesman Test",
      "distributor_id": 999,
      "area_id": 1,
      "region_id": 1,
      "pjp_data": [
        {
          "pjp_code": 8888,
          "approval_status": "Approved",
          "route_data": [
            {
              "route_code": "8888",
              "route_name": "Route Test",
              "destination_data": [
                {
                  "destination_id": 1001,
                  "destination_code": "DEST001",
                  "destination_type": "Outlet",
                  "destination_name": "Toko Test",
                  "longitude": -6.17511,
                  "latitude": 106.865036,
                  "arrive_at": null,
                  "start": 1769904000,
                  "finish": 1769907600,
                  "skip_at": null,
                  "skip_reason": "Toko Tutup"
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "paging": {
    "total_record": 1,
    "page_current": 1,
    "page_limit": 10,
    "page_total": 1
  },
  "request_id": "xxx"
}
```

**Point 6 dari Docs - Location Monitoring (Distributor)**

URL: `{{url}}scylla-pjp/v1/live-monitoring-distributor`

**Changes yang sudah diimplementasikan:**
1. ✅ Query join outlet_visit_list menggunakan `ovl.route_code = ro.route_code` (bukan outlet_code)
2. ✅ Response field `destination_type` hardcoded sebagai "Outlet"
3. ✅ Filter menjadi optional

**Perbedaan dengan Principal:**
- Menggunakan tabel `pjp` (bukan `pjp_principles`)
- Response menggunakan `pjp_id` (bukan `pjp_code`) - sesuai docs
- destination_type selalu "Outlet"

**Expected Response Structure:**
```json
{
  "message": "Success",
  "data": [
    {
      "emp_id": 9999,
      "emp_code": "SLS9999",
      "emp_name": "Salesman Test",
      "distributor_id": 999,
      "area_id": 1,
      "region_id": 1,
      "pjp_data": [
        {
          "pjp_id": 7777,
          "approval_status": "Approved",
          "route_data": [
            {
              "route_code": "7777",
              "route_name": "Route Test",
              "destination_data": [
                {
                  "destination_id": 2001,
                  "destination_code": "OTL001",
                  "destination_type": "Outlet",
                  "destination_name": "Toko Test",
                  "longitude": -6.17511,
                  "latitude": 106.865036,
                  "arrive_at": null,
                  "start": 1769904000,
                  "finish": 1769907600,
                  "skip_at": null
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "paging": {...}
}
```

query.description: Distributor ID (optional). If NULL → Principal, If NOT NULL → Distributor. Note: Ini TIDAK untuk filter data, hanya untuk menentukan view (Principal/Distributor)

request.description:
**Point 7 dari Docs - Location Monitoring Detail**

URL: `{{url}}scylla-pjp/v1/monitoring_locations/details`

**Changes yang sudah diimplementasikan:**
1. ✅ Response field `status` ditambahkan pada data Shipment

**Response Structure:**
```json
{
  "message": "Success",
  "data": [
    {
      "visit_information": {
        "activity_date": "2026-02-01",
        "company_name": "PT Sukses Makmur",
        "company_code": "SM001",
        "level": "Distributor",
        "emp_id": 9999,
        "emp_code": "SLS9999",
        "emp_name": "Salesman Test",
        "activity_time": "2026-02-01 08:00:00",
        "planned": 1,
        "on_going": 0,
        "extra_call": 0,
        "visited": 1,
        "skipped": 0
      },
      "sales": [...],
      "return": [...],
      "collection": [],
      "expense": [...],
      "shipment": [
        {
          "shipment_no": "SHP001",
          "status": "Delivered",
          "shipment_data": [...]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "request_id": "xxx"
}
```

Debug endpoint untuk melihat info user dari JWT token.

Berguna untuk memastikan:
- cust_id dari token
- distributor_id dari token
- emp_id dari token

variable.description: Date format YYYY-MM-DD untuk Detail endpoint

exec: // Convert date to epoch if needed
